questions.question: Multimeter ka use kya hai?

options.A: Voltage, Current aur Resistance measure karna
options.B: Screw tight karna

questions.explanation: Multimeter ek electronic measuring instrument hai jo voltage, current aur resistance jaisi electrical properties ko measure karta hai.

questions.question: ESD ka full form kya hai mobile repair mein?

options.B: Electrostatic Discharge

questions.explanation: ESD ka full form Electrostatic Discharge hai, jo sensitive electronic components ko damage hone se bachata hai.

questions.question: Ek short circuit ko detect karne ke liye multimeter ki kaun si setting use karte hain?

options.B: Resistance (Ohm)

questions.explanation: Continuity setting short circuit detect karne ke liye use hoti hai. Agar multimeter beep karta hai, to wahan continuity hai, jo short circuit indicate kar sakti hai.

questions.question: Soldering iron ka primary use kya hai mobile repair mein?

options.B: Components ko jodna (join karna)

questions.explanation: Soldering iron ka use electronic components ko PCB par solder wire ki help se permanent join karne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Hot air gun ka use kis kaam ke liye hota hai?

options.B: Components ko desolder aur resolder karne ke liye
options.C: Battery ko test karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Hot air gun ka use surface-mount components (SMD) ko PCB se remove (desolder) aur wapas lagane (resolder) ke liye kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Capacitor ka function kya hota hai circuit mein?

options.B: Voltage regulate karna

questions.explanation: Capacitor ek electrical component hai jo electrical energy ko electrostatic field mein store karta hai.

questions.question: Resistor ka unit kya hai?

options.B: Ampere

questions.explanation: Resistance ko Ohms (Ω) mein measure kiya jata hai.

questions.question: DC power supply ka use mobile repair mein kya hai?

options.B: Phone ko direct power dekar test karna

questions.explanation: DC power supply ka use phone ko battery ke bina direct power dekar uski functionality aur current consumption ko test karne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: ESD wrist strap kyon pehnte hain?

options.B: Operator ko electric shock se bachane ke liye
options.C: Static electricity ko operator se components tak jane se rokne ke liye
options.D: Static electricity ko components se operator tak jane se rokne ke liye

questions.explanation: ESD wrist strap operator ke body mein build-up static electricity ko ground karta hai, jisse sensitive components damage hone se bach jate hain.

questions.question: Diode ka primary function kya hai?

options.A: Current ko dono directions mein flow hone dena
options.B: Current ko sirf ek direction mein flow hone dena

questions.explanation: Diode ek semiconductor device hai jo current ko sirf ek direction mein flow hone deta hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa tool phone ke back panel ya display ko alag karne ke liye use hota hai without damage?

options.B: Prying tool (Spudger)

questions.explanation: Prying tools (jaise plastic spudgers) specially designed hote hain taaki phone ke delicate parts ko bina damage kiye open kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Flux ka kya role hai soldering mein?

options.B: Oxidation prevent karna aur solder flow improve karna

questions.explanation: Flux soldering ke dauran oxidation ko prevent karta hai aur molten solder ke flow ko improve karta hai, jisse clean aur strong joint banta hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa component current ke flow ko control karta hai?

options.B: Resistor

questions.explanation: Resistor current ke flow ko resist karke control karta hai.

questions.question: IC (Integrated Circuit) ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Integrated Circuit

questions.explanation: IC ka full form Integrated Circuit hai, jo multiple electronic components ko ek single chip par combine karta hai.

questions.question: Ek mobile phone mein 'Ground' point ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Circuit ke liye reference voltage provide karna

questions.explanation: Ground point circuit ke sabhi components ke liye common reference voltage (usually 0V) provide karta hai, jo proper circuit operation ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa tool fine screws ko kholne aur tight karne ke liye use hota hai mobile phones mein?

options.B: Standard screwdriver

questions.explanation: Mobile phones mein bahut chhote aur specific types ke screws hote hain, jinhe kholne ke liye precision screwdriver set ki zaroorat hoti hai.

questions.question: Agar multimeter continuity mode mein beep nahi kar raha hai, to iska kya matlab ho sakta hai?

options.B: Open circuit hai

questions.explanation: Continuity mode mein beep na karna usually open circuit ya high resistance indicate karta hai, matlab current flow nahi ho raha hai.

questions.question: Mobile phone mein 'Motherboard' ka kya function hai?

options.B: Saare components ko connect karna aur unhe operate karna

questions.explanation: Motherboard phone ka main circuit board hai, jo CPU, memory, aur dusre ICs ko connect karta hai aur phone ke sabhi functions ko control karta hai.

questions.question: Li-ion battery ki kya khasiyat hai jo mobile phones mein use hoti hai?

options.B: Lightweight hoti hai aur high energy density deti hai
options.D: Sirf ek baar charge ho sakti hai

questions.explanation: Lithium-ion batteries lightweight hoti hain aur high energy density provide karti hain, isliye mobile phones ke liye ideal hain.

questions.question: Mobile phone mein 'CPU' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Phone ke saare operations ko process karna

questions.explanation: CPU (Central Processing Unit) phone ka brain hota hai, jo saare calculations aur instructions ko process karta hai.

questions.question: Agar phone mein sound nahi aa raha hai speaker se, to kaun sa component faulty ho sakta hai?

options.B: Speaker

questions.explanation: Speaker sound output ke liye responsible hota hai. Agar speaker se sound nahi aa raha hai, to speaker hi faulty ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Mobile phone mein display ke kitne common types hote hain?

options.B: 2 (LCD aur AMOLED)

questions.explanation: Mobile phones mein commonly LCD (Liquid Crystal Display) aur AMOLED (Active Matrix Organic Light Emitting Diode) displays use hote hain.

questions.question: Charging port ka kya function hai?

options.B: Phone ko power supply se connect karke charge karna

questions.explanation: Charging port phone ko charger se connect karne aur battery ko charge karne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Mobile phone mein 'Power IC' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Phone ke saare components ko required voltage aur current supply karna

questions.explanation: Power IC (Power Management IC) phone ke different sections ko required voltage aur current supply ko manage karta hai.

questions.question: Haptic feedback ke liye kaun sa component responsible hai?

options.B: Microphone

questions.explanation: Vibrator motor phone mein haptic feedback (vibration) provide karta hai.

questions.question: SIM card reader ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Subscriber Identity Module (SIM) ko read karna

questions.explanation: SIM card reader SIM card ko read karta hai, jisse phone cellular network se connect ho pata hai.

questions.question: Mobile phone mein 'NAND' chip ka kya function hai?

options.B: Operating system aur user data store karna

questions.explanation: NAND chip (Flash memory) phone ki main storage hoti hai jahan OS, apps aur user data store hota hai.

questions.question: Agar phone call ke dauran aapki awaaz dusre end par nahi ja rahi hai, to kaun sa component suspect ho sakta hai?

options.B: Microphone

questions.explanation: Microphone aapki awaaz ko capture karta hai. Agar awaaz nahi ja rahi hai, to microphone faulty ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa component phone ko wireless network (Wi-Fi) se connect karne mein help karta hai?

options.B: Wi-Fi Antenna/Module

questions.explanation: Wi-Fi Antenna aur usse associated module phone ko Wi-Fi networks se connect karne ke liye responsible hote hain.

questions.question: Accelerometer sensor ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Phone ke orientation aur motion ko detect karna

questions.explanation: Accelerometer phone ke orientation (portrait/landscape) aur linear acceleration (motion) ko detect karta hai.

questions.question: Earpiece speaker ka kya use hai?

options.B: Call ke dauran awaaz sunna

questions.explanation: Earpiece speaker call ke dauran dusre person ki awaaz ko sunne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Ek smartphone mein 'RAM' ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Temporary data storage for running apps

questions.explanation: RAM (Random Access Memory) running applications aur current operating system data ke liye temporary storage provide karti hai.

questions.question: Mobile phone mein 'Backlight IC' ka kya function hai?

options.B: Display ki backlight brightness control karna

questions.explanation: Backlight IC display ki brightness ko regulate karne ke liye responsible hota hai, especially LCD panels mein.

questions.question: Antenna ka kya kaam hai mobile phone mein?

options.B: Radio waves transmit aur receive karna

questions.explanation: Antenna cellular, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth aur GPS signals (radio waves) ko transmit aur receive karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Phone ko open karne se pehle sabse pehla safety step kya hai?

options.B: SIM card tray nikalna

questions.explanation: Kisi bhi repair se pehle phone ko completely switch off karna zaroori hai taaki electric shock ya component damage se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Display replacement ke dauran, adhesive ko soft karne ke liye kya use karte hain?

options.B: Hair dryer ya heat gun

questions.explanation: Heat (hair dryer ya heat gun se) adhesive ko soft karti hai, jisse display ko safely remove karna aasan ho jata hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa tool delicate flex cables ko disconnect karne ke liye best hai?

options.B: Plastic spudger

questions.explanation: Plastic spudger non-conductive hota hai aur delicate flex cables ko bina damage kiye disconnect karne ke liye ideal hai.

questions.question: Screws ko organize karna kyon important hai disassembly ke dauran?

options.B: Components ko mix hone se bachane aur correct location par re-assemble karne ke liye
options.D: Screw ko saaf rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Alag-alag screws ki length aur type different hote hain. Unhe organize karne se re-assembly ke dauran galti hone ki sambhavna kam ho jati hai.

questions.question: Agar phone ki battery non-removable hai, to use disconnect karne ka standard procedure kya hai?

options.B: Battery connector ko motherboard se disconnect karna

questions.explanation: Non-removable battery ko disconnect karne ke liye uske flex connector ko motherboard se carefully disconnect karna hota hai, na ki battery ko physically remove karna.

questions.question: Phone ki waterproofing seal ko damage hone se kaise bachayenge display removal ke dauran?

options.B: Sharp metal tools use karke
options.C: Carefully aur evenly heat apply karke, aur thin prying tools use karke

questions.explanation: Waterproofing seal delicate hoti hai. Use damage se bachane ke liye controlled heat aur non-metallic, thin prying tools ka use karna chahiye.

questions.question: Jab ek naya display install karte hain, to kya ensure karna zaroori hai?

options.A: Display ko bahut tightly press karna
options.B: Saare flex cables properly connected hon

questions.explanation: Naye display ko install karte samay, sabhi flex cables (display, touch, front camera) ka proper aur secure connection ensure karna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar screws magnetize ho gaye hain, to unhe handle karne ke liye kaun sa tool helpful hoga?

options.B: Magnetizer/Demagnetizer tool

questions.explanation: Magnetizer/Demagnetizer tool screws ko magnetize ya demagnetize karne ke liye use hota hai, jisse unhe handle karna aasan ho jata hai.

questions.question: Kya phone repair karte samay gloves pehnna zaroori hai?

options.A: Nahi, sirf agar haath gande hon
options.B: Haan, ESD protection aur finger oils se bachne ke liye
options.C: Sirf agar chemical use kar rahe hon
options.D: Nahi, gloves se grip kam hoti hai

questions.explanation: Gloves ESD protection provide karte hain aur components par finger oils ya smudges lagne se bachate hain.

questions.question: Jab motherboard ko phone se remove karte hain, to kaun se connections disconnect karne hote hain?

options.B: Display, battery, camera, antenna, charging port flex cables
options.D: Koi connection nahi, seedha pull kar do

questions.explanation: Motherboard phone ka central hub hai. Use remove karne ke liye usse connect hone wale sabhi peripheral components ke flex cables ko disconnect karna padta hai.

questions.question: Adhesive residue ko display ya frame se remove karne ke liye kya use karte hain?

options.B: Isopropyl Alcohol (IPA)

questions.explanation: Isopropyl Alcohol (IPA) adhesive residue ko safely aur effectively remove karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko pata chale ki phone mein Torx screws hain, to aap kaun sa screwdriver use karenge?

options.B: Flathead

questions.explanation: Har screw type ke liye specific screwdriver ki zaroorat hoti hai. Torx screws ke liye Torx screwdriver hi use hota hai.

questions.question: Jab phone ko re-assemble karte hain, to kya ensure karna chahiye?

options.A: Kuch screws ko loose chhod dena
options.B: Saare connectors properly seated hon aur screws apni jagah par hon

questions.explanation: Proper re-assembly ke liye sabhi connectors ka sahi tarike se laga hona aur saare screws ka apni original jagah par tight hona zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar phone ka frame bend ho gaya hai, to naya display lagane se pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Frame ko straighten karna ya replace karna

questions.explanation: Bend frame par naya display lagane se display crack ho sakta hai ya theek se fit nahi hoga. Frame ko theek karna ya replace karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Pentalobe screws kis brand ke phones mein commonly milte hain?

options.B: Xiaomi

questions.explanation: Pentalobe screws Apple iPhones aur kuch MacBooks mein use hote hain, jo unke proprietary design ka hissa hai.

questions.question: Jab battery ko remove karte hain, to kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Use bend karna ya puncture karna
options.B: Carefully pry karna aur zyada force avoid karna

questions.explanation: Lithium-ion batteries ko puncture ya bend karne se aag lag sakti hai ya explosion ho sakta hai. Unhe bahut carefully remove karna chahiye.

questions.question: Agar phone ke components par dust ya debris hai, to use kaise clean karenge?

options.B: Compressed air blower aur soft brush se

questions.explanation: Compressed air blower aur soft brush delicate components se dust aur debris ko safely remove karne ke liye best hain.

questions.question: Agar phone boot loop mein stuck hai (logo par atka hai), to iska kya karan ho sakta hai?

options.B: Software corruption ya faulty update

questions.explanation: Boot loop usually software corruption, failed update, ya OS files ke damage hone ki wajah se hota hai.

questions.question: Factory Reset karne se phone par kya effect hota hai?

options.B: Saara user data aur settings delete ho jaate hain, phone factory settings par aa jata hai
options.C: Operating system update ho jata hai

questions.explanation: Factory Reset phone ko uski original factory settings par restore karta hai, jisse saara user data aur installed apps delete ho jaate hain.

questions.question: Agar phone slow chal raha hai aur apps crash ho rahe hain, to pehla troubleshooting step kya hoga?

options.B: Cache clear karna aur unwanted apps uninstall karna

questions.explanation: Slow performance aur app crashes often accumulated cache, insufficient storage, ya background mein chal rahe bahut saare apps ki wajah se hote hain.

questions.question: Phone 'Flashing' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Phone ki camera flash use karna
options.B: Phone par naya firmware ya operating system install karna
options.C: Phone ki screen ko saaf karna

questions.explanation: Flashing mein phone ke internal memory par naya firmware (OS) install kiya jata hai, jo software issues ko solve karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Safe Mode Android phones mein kyon use hota hai?

options.B: Third-party apps ko disable karke troubleshooting karne ke liye
options.C: Battery life extend karne ke liye
options.D: Phone ko permanently unlock karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Safe Mode sirf basic system apps ke saath phone ko boot karta hai, jisse aap problematic third-party apps ko identify aur uninstall kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Agar phone mein network signal nahi aa raha hai (software issue suspect hai), to kya check karenge?

options.B: Airplane mode on/off karke, network settings reset karke, SIM card check karke

questions.explanation: Network signal issues ke liye pehle software related steps jaise airplane mode, network settings reset, aur SIM card ki proper placement check karna chahiye.

questions.question: Data backup kyon important hai repair se pehle?

options.B: Customer ke data ko loss hone se bachane ke liye
options.C: Repair process ko slow karne ke liye
options.D: Phone ki speed badhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Repair ke dauran data loss ka risk hota hai, isliye customer ke important photos, contacts, aur documents ka backup lena zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar phone mein touch response nahi aa raha hai (software issue suspect hai), to kya kar sakte hain?

options.B: Phone ko restart karna ya factory reset karna

questions.explanation: Restart ya factory reset jaise software solutions kabhi-kabhi temporary touch issues ko solve kar sakte hain, agar problem hardware se na ho.

questions.question: Android phone mein 'Developer Options' kyon use hote hain?

options.B: Advanced system settings aur debugging options access karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Developer Options mein USB debugging, animation scales, aur other advanced settings hoti hain jo troubleshooting aur development ke liye useful hain.

questions.question: Agar phone ka Wi-Fi ya Bluetooth connect nahi ho raha hai (software issue suspect hai), to kya check karenge?

options.B: Network settings reset karna, phone restart karna, software update check karna

questions.explanation: Software related connectivity issues ko troubleshoot karne ke liye network settings reset, restart aur OS updates helpful ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Phone 'Hard Reset' aur 'Soft Reset' mein kya difference hai?

options.B: Hard Reset data erase karta hai, Soft Reset sirf phone restart karta hai
options.C: Soft Reset data erase karta hai, Hard Reset restart karta hai

questions.explanation: Hard Reset (Factory Reset) saara data erase karta hai, jabki Soft Reset (restart) sirf phone ko reboot karta hai bina data loss ke.

questions.question: Agar phone mein 'Storage Full' ka message aa raha hai, to kya steps le sakte hain?

options.B: Unwanted apps uninstall karna, cache clear karna, files ko cloud/SD card par move karna

questions.explanation: Storage full issue ko solve karne ke liye unnecessary apps, cache aur large files ko manage karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Firmware update ke dauran power loss hone par kya ho sakta hai?

options.A: Phone ki battery life badh jayegi
options.B: Phone brick ho sakta hai (unusable ho sakta hai)

questions.explanation: Firmware update ke dauran power loss hone se phone ka operating system corrupt ho sakta hai, jisse phone brick ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar phone ki screen freeze ho gayi hai aur koi response nahi de rahi hai, to kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Force restart karne ki koshish karna (power button aur volume button combination)

questions.explanation: Screen freeze hone par force restart (power button aur volume down/up button ka combination) phone ko reboot karne mein help kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Google account ka kya role hai Android phones mein?

options.B: Apps download karna, data sync karna, phone ko locate karna

questions.explanation: Google account Play Store se apps download karne, contacts aur calendar sync karne, aur Find My Device jaisi features ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Agar phone mein app download nahi ho rahe hain, to kya check karenge?

options.B: Internet connection, storage space, Google Play Store settings

questions.explanation: App download issues usually internet connectivity, insufficient storage, ya Play Store ke cache/data se related hote hain.

questions.question: Software troubleshooting mein 'ADB' ka kya use hai?

options.B: Android Debug Bridge, jo PC se phone ko control aur debug karta hai

questions.explanation: ADB (Android Debug Bridge) ek command-line tool hai jo developers aur technicians ko Android device se communicate aur control karne deta hai.

questions.question: Agar phone ki display tut gayi hai, to repair ke liye kya karna hoga?

options.B: Pura display assembly replace karna

questions.explanation: Modern smartphones mein, display aur digitizer (touch panel) ek saath laminated hote hain, isliye pura display assembly replace karna padta hai.

questions.question: Charging port kharab hone ke kya symptoms ho sakte hain?

options.B: Phone charge na hona ya intermittent charge hona

questions.explanation: Charging port kharab hone par phone charge nahi hota ya baar-baar connect/disconnect hota hai.

questions.question: Liquid damage wale phone ko repair karne ka pehla step kya hai?

options.B: Phone ko switch off karna aur battery disconnect karna

questions.explanation: Liquid damage hone par sabse pehle phone ko switch off karke battery disconnect karna zaroori hai taaki short circuit aur further damage se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Agar phone ki battery drain ho rahi hai bahut tez, to kya reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Old/damaged battery, background apps, high brightness

questions.explanation: Battery drain ke common reasons mein old battery, excessive background app usage, aur high screen brightness shamil hain.

questions.question: Microphone replacement ke liye kaun si technique use hoti hai?

options.B: Soldering ya flex cable replacement

questions.explanation: Microphones ya to PCB par solder hote hain ya flex cable ke through connect hote hain, jinhe replace karne ke liye soldering ya flex replacement ki zaroorat hoti hai.

questions.question: Speaker (loudspeaker) kaam na karne par kya check karenge?

options.B: Speaker unit, uske connectors, aur audio settings

questions.explanation: Speaker issues ke liye speaker unit ki physical condition, uske flex connectors aur phone ke audio settings ko check karna chahiye.

questions.question: Agar phone ka camera blur photos le raha hai ya focus nahi kar raha, to kya issue ho sakta hai?

options.B: Camera lens dirty hai ya camera module damaged hai

questions.explanation: Blur photos ya focusing issues usually dirty camera lens, damaged camera module, ya software glitches ki wajah se hote hain.

questions.question: Power button ya volume button stuck hone par kya repair option hai?

options.B: Button flex cable assembly replace karna

questions.explanation: Stuck buttons often damaged button flex cable ya debris ke jam jane ki wajah se hote hain, jinhe replace karke theek kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar phone earphone connect karne par bhi sound nahi de raha, to kya check karenge?

options.B: Headphone jack ya uski flex cable

questions.explanation: Headphone jack mein problem ya uski connectivity issue ki wajah se earphone mein sound nahi aata.

questions.question: Liquid damage ke baad PCB ko clean karne ke liye kaun sa solution use karte hain?

options.B: Distilled water aur Isopropyl Alcohol (IPA)

questions.explanation: Distilled water aur Isopropyl Alcohol (IPA) conductive salts aur corrosion ko remove karne ke liye safe aur effective hain.

questions.question: Agar phone over-heating ho raha hai, to kya possible reasons ho sakte hain?

options.B: Heavy usage, faulty battery, CPU overwork, short circuit

questions.explanation: Over-heating ke reasons mein intensive app usage, degraded battery, CPU par zyada load, ya internal short circuit shamil hain.

questions.question: SIM card reader damage hone par kya issue aata hai?

options.B: SIM card detect nahi hota ya network nahi aata

questions.explanation: SIM card reader damage hone par phone SIM card ko read nahi kar pata, jisse network connectivity issue hoti hai.

questions.question: Agar phone mein proximity sensor kaam nahi kar raha, to kya problem hogi?

options.B: Calls ke dauran screen off nahi hogi

questions.explanation: Proximity sensor call ke dauran screen ko automatically off karta hai jab phone kaan ke paas hota hai, jisse accidental touches avoid hote hain.

questions.question: Vibrator motor replace karne ke liye kaun sa tool sabse zaroori hai?

options.B: Screwdriver

questions.explanation: Vibrator motor usually screws se attached hota hai, isliye screwdriver sabse zaroori tool hai.

questions.question: Agar phone ki flash light kaam nahi kar rahi, to kya check karenge?

options.B: Rear camera module, uski connectivity, ya software settings

questions.explanation: Flash light rear camera module ka part hoti hai. Uski non-functionality ke liye camera module, uske connections ya software settings check karne hote hain.

questions.question: Home button (physical) kaam na karne par kya repair option hai?

options.B: Home button flex cable assembly replace karna

questions.explanation: Physical home button ki functionality uske flex cable par depend karti hai. Faulty hone par uski assembly replace ki ja sakti hai.

questions.question: Agar phone mein koi component short circuit dikha raha hai, to uski location kaise find karenge?

options.B: Multimeter se continuity check karke aur voltage drop test karke

questions.explanation: Short circuit ki exact location find karne ke liye multimeter se continuity test aur voltage drop method ka use karte hain.

questions.question: Customer ko repair cost estimate dete samay kya considerations honi chahiye?

options.B: Part ki cost, labour charges, aur possible extra charges clear karna

questions.explanation: Transparency maintain karne ke liye customer ko detailed cost breakup dena chahiye, jisme parts aur labour charges shamil hon.

questions.question: Agar customer phone repair hone ke baad bhi kisi issue ki complaint karta hai, to aapka pehla step kya hoga?

options.B: Complaint ko sunna aur phone ko re-examine karna
options.D: Bolna ki ab phone theek nahi ho sakta

questions.explanation: Customer ki complaint ko sunna aur issue ko dobara troubleshoot karna professional customer service ka part hai.

questions.question: Koi phone 'dead' hai (bilkul on nahi ho raha), to troubleshooting kahan se shuru karenge?

options.B: Battery, charging port, aur power IC section check karna

questions.explanation: Dead phone ke liye sabse pehle power source aur power management circuit ko check kiya jata hai, jaise battery, charging port aur Power IC.

questions.question: Customer ko repair warranty ke baare mein inform karna kyon zaroori hai?

options.B: Customer trust build karne aur future issues ke liye clarity dene ke liye
options.C: Extra fees charge karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Repair warranty customer ko assurance deti hai aur technician ki credibility badhati hai.

questions.question: Agar phone mein water damage hai aur wo on nahi ho raha, to kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Charger laga kar on karne ki koshish karna
options.B: Phone ko disassemble karke, clean karke, aur dry karke test karna

questions.explanation: Water damage mein phone ko disassemble karke, corrosion ko clean karke aur components ko properly dry karke hi further troubleshooting karna chahiye.

questions.question: Customer se phone receive karte samay kya details note karna zaroori hai?

options.B: Phone model, IMEI, customer ki complaint, aur physical condition

questions.explanation: Ye details future reference, ownership verification aur repair history maintain karne ke liye crucial hain.

questions.question: Agar phone mein short circuit hai aur power supply par high current draw ho raha hai, to kya method use kar sakte hain short ko locate karne ke liye?

options.B: Thermal camera ya rosin method use karna
options.D: Phone ko on karne ki koshish karna

questions.explanation: Thermal camera ya rosin method short circuit wale component ko identify karne mein help karte hain jo heat ho raha hota hai.

questions.question: Customer ko repair process ke baare mein kya batana chahiye?

options.B: Expected time, cost, aur kya repair kiya jayega
options.D: Sirf yeh ki phone theek ho jayega

questions.explanation: Customer ko clear communication provide karna unhe inform aur confident feel karata hai.

questions.question: Agar phone ka network signal weak hai (hardware issue suspect hai), to kya check karenge?

options.B: Antenna flex cable, RF IC, ya network section mein physical damage

questions.explanation: Weak network signal hardware issue hone par antenna, RF (Radio Frequency) IC, aur network section ke components ko check karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Phone repair ke baad final quality check mein kya shamil hai?

options.A: Sirf phone on ho raha hai ya nahi
options.B: Sabhi functions (display, touch, camera, mic, speaker, charging, network) ka test karna
options.C: Customer ko seedha phone de dena

questions.explanation: Comprehensive quality check mein phone ke sabhi major functions ko test karna shamil hai taaki customer ko fully functional phone mile.

questions.question: Customer ko data privacy ke baare mein kya assurance deni chahiye?

options.B: Ki uske data ko private rakha jayega aur koi access nahi kiya jayega
options.C: Ki data delete kar diya jayega
options.D: Ki data backup lena zaroori nahi hai

questions.explanation: Customer ke personal data ki privacy maintain karna ek professional repair technician ki responsibility hai.

questions.question: Agar phone mein 'No Service' ka message aa raha hai aur SIM theek hai, to kya possible reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Baseband IC ya RF Transceiver IC mein problem

questions.explanation: No Service ka issue often Baseband IC ya RF Transceiver IC (network related ICs) mein problem ki wajah se hota hai.

questions.question: Customer ke phone ko handle karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Use apne phone ki tarah carefully handle karna
options.C: Use dusre phones ke saath mix kar dena
options.D: Use gande haathon se touch karna

questions.explanation: Customer ke phone ko utmost care ke saath handle karna chahiye, jaise ki wo apna hi phone ho.

questions.question: Agar phone mein charging hoti hai lekin battery percentage increase nahi hota, to kya issue ho sakta hai?

options.B: Charging IC (Tristar/U2 IC) ya battery management system mein problem

questions.explanation: Charging hoti hai par percentage increase na hone ka matlab hai ki power input to hai, par battery use store ya recognize nahi kar pa rahi, jo Charging IC ya BMS se related ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Customer ko repaired phone wapas dete samay kya ensure karna chahiye?

options.B: Customer ko phone ki working condition dikhana aur koi bhi doubt clear karna
options.C: Jaldi se jaldi phone de dena
options.D: Customer ko repair ke baare mein kuch na batana

questions.explanation: Customer satisfaction ke liye unhe repair ki working condition dikhana aur unke sabhi sawalon ka jawab dena zaroori hai.
